name: Google Ads
description: API to programmatically manage Google Ads accounts: campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, budgets, bids, account management, and reporting.

auth_methods.note: Primary authorization is OAuth2 (including service-account/server-to-server flows via OAuth token exchange). Additionally requests must include a developer token in the developer-token header.

credential_access.note: Developers can create OAuth2 credentials via Google Cloud and use test developer tokens/test accounts without approval for development (no human approval required to get working test credentials). Production developer token access requires application and review.

api_surface.note: The API exposes gRPC as the primary protocol and a limited REST interface; client libraries are provided in multiple languages. The API covers campaign, ad group, ad, keyword, budget, bidding, reporting, and many other product objects.

buildability.note: Production developer token requires approval/review for production access if you need live production access. You can get OAuth2 credentials and a test developer token/self-serve test accounts to develop and test immediately; to use production access against live accounts an approved developer token is required and may involve review.

queries: Google Ads API pricing "pricing" "Google Ads API"
